assertions.assertion: Warns against using in-memory stores in production
assertions.rationale: Explicitly states in-memory stores are 'not suitable for production'.

assertions.assertion: The store class has a FindByEntityIdAsync method that accepts a string entityId and CancellationToken
assertions.rationale: FindByEntityIdAsync(string entityId, CancellationToken cancellationToken) is present.

assertions.assertion: Uses EF Core (DbContext) for data access
assertions.rationale: Uses SamlDbContext extending DbContext with proper EF Core patterns.
